class.name: Lazy_State
class.brief_description: Object that accepts boolean value and contains methods to create simple 'states' for finite state machines.
class.description: Should be useful for incredibly simple states. Initializes as 'false'.
class.methods:
Passes in the condition that needs to be checked i.e. 'Player velocity is greater than 0'
[...]
Takes no arguments, forces state to change whether it is 'true' or 'false'
[...]
Takes no arguments, returns the held value of the boolean state.
[...]
Takes no arguments, returns whether or not the held value and current value of the condition are different.
